name: claim_verifier_sample
description: Starter dataset for smoke and demo-level evaluation. Verdict expectations are intentionally permissive; replace with a stricter gold set before final grading.

cases.claim: Caffeine worsens sleep quality in adults.
cases.notes: Broad, literature-rich topic. Useful to check retrieval quality and verdict synthesis.

cases.claim: Mindfulness-based cognitive therapy improves obsessive-compulsive disorder symptoms.
cases.notes: Useful for validating that the system can find clearly intervention-driven evidence.
